entry.title: New: RES24-256 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
GRANTING A SPECIAL MANAGEMENT AREA MAJOR PERMIT TO ALLOW THE CONSTRUCTION OF A NEW SINGLE-FAMILY DWELLING UNIT AND OTHER IMPROVEMENTS, AND DENYING A SHORELINE SETBACK VARIANCE FOR STRUCTURES AND ACTIVITIES IN THE SHORELINE SETBACK AREA AT TAX MAP KEY 3-9-002: 002: 031 IN HAWAIʻI KAI, OʻAHU.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
